'''''Ewoks'' 8''' is the eighth issue of [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|Marvel's ''Ewoks'']] series of comic books and was published under the [[Marvel Comics]] [[Star Comics]] imprint on [[April 1]], [[1986]] with a cover date of [[July]] [[1986]]. This story is split into three chapters: "Eye of the Kreegon," "Alive Again," and "The Beast Goes Wild."
